added: History: merge two periods into one from a period's overflow menu, combining their notes and symptoms
fixed: Logging consecutive days no longer splits a period into disconnected entries when the previous day was saved with an explicit end date instead of left ongoing
An ongoing period now continues to cover new days after reopening the app on a later date, instead of only through the day it was last checked
One-time repair on app start automatically rejoins periods that were already split apart by the day-after-close bug
